description: Core fos-study files for CJ Foodville first-round daily interview drill generation.

files.note: Candidate experience to CJ Foodville F&B/e-Commerce domain mapping.
F&B/e-Commerce digital channel bounded contexts and operational risk overview.
Order, store acceptance, pickup, delivery, cancellation, and recovery state-machine drill source.
Coupon, promotion, membership, CJ ONE points, policy ordering, and concurrency source.
Payment, partial cancel, refund, settlement, reconciliation, and incident-response source.
Outbox/inbox, idempotency, retry, and distributed event boundary source.
Spring transaction boundary, AFTER_COMMIT, propagation, and external side-effect source.
MyBatis XML mapper, dynamic SQL, resultMap, and legacy-friendly query operation source.
JPA N+1, read model, fetch strategy, and commerce query-performance source.
Redis/cache invalidation, cache-aside, TTL, fanout, and payment-time revalidation source.
Legacy JSP/jQuery and new Spring API/mobile/SPA coexistence source.
F&B/e-Commerce operations, monitoring, incident communication, and RCA source.
Candidate RCC cache-control, async cache generation, strategy, and DB uniqueness experience.
Candidate static-data cache refresh, StampedLock, and abstraction-after-repetition experience.
Candidate multi-server cache invalidation with RabbitMQ/Azure Service Bus Fanout source.
Candidate Spring Batch, OpenSearch, RAG indexing, restartability, and provider-strategy source.
Candidate incident analysis, graceful shutdown, trace-based RCA, and operational communication source.
